name: Japanese Mountains 01
description: Important geography, culture, risks, and natural facts about Japanese mountains
author: rewouh

items.title: percentage of Japan covered by mountains
items.mnemonic: 7+3 = 10, which is also the proportion of the world's active volcanoes located in Japan, link those knowledge together!

items.title: height of Mount Fuji
items.mnemonic: Fuji stands at 3-7-7-6. Visualize yourself climbing stairs labeled 3 → 7 → 7 → 6 leading directly to the highest viewpoint in Japan. Those are biiiiig steps, giant even, who can actually use those ?

items.title: second highest mountain in Japan
items.mnemonic: Fuji is first. Kita is jealous so he eats kitkats.

items.title: Mt. Fuji active or extinct ?
items.mnemonic: Fuji is sleeping, not dead. Imagine the mountain with one eye open while Tokyo nervously watches from afar.

items.title: the three holy mountains of Japan ?
items.mnemonic: Forming the Holy Trio : Fuji Haku Tate (same letters!).

items.title: percentage of the world's active volcanoes located in Japan
items.mnemonic: If all the volcanoes in the world were to erupt at the same time, Japan would be in way more trouble than everyone with 10% of them!
